answers.stem: 是否存在日志系统（log/printk/println 宏）与日志级别控制？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: void debug_print(char *fmt, ...); void serious_print(char *fmt, ...); void printf(char *fmt, ...);

answers.stem: 是否存在 panic/崩溃处理路径（panic_handler/oom/abort 等）？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: void panic(char *s) { ... serious_print("panic: "); serious_print(s); serious_print("\n"); backtrace(); panicked = 1; for (;;) ; }

answers.stem: panic 路径会输出哪些诊断？（寄存器 dump/栈回溯/停机；必须引用实现证据）
answers.value: Panic message, Stack trace (via backtrace), Halt (infinite loop). Register dump is not explicitly in panic() but backtrace prints return addresses.

evidence.excerpt: void panic(char *s) { ... serious_print("panic: "); serious_print(s); serious_print("\n"); backtrace(); panicked = 1; for (;;) ; }
void backtrace() { ... while (fp < bottom) { uint64 ra = *(fp - 1); serious_print("%p\n", ra - 4); fp = (uint64 *)*(fp - 2); } }

answers.stem: 是否实现栈回溯 (backtrace/unwind/stack_trace)？（必须三态；仅打印 ra 不算）

evidence.excerpt: void backtrace() { uint64 *fp = (uint64 *)r_fp(); ... while (fp < bottom) { uint64 ra = *(fp - 1); serious_print("%p\n", ra - 4); fp = (uint64 *)*(fp - 2); } }

answers.stem: 是否存在 **内核驻留的交互式监视器（kernel monitor）**？（对齐 Stallings《操作系统：精髓与设计原理》语境：**在内核态上下文**接受命令、用于探查/操控系统的监视器；**不包括**仅在用户态运行的常规 shell，如 `xv6-user/sh.c`、`user/` 下用户程序等——除非题面另有定义。必须三态；若 `implemented`：须给出 3–10 个 **用户可键入的 monitor 命令名** 及对应 **内核内** 解析/分发入口的 `路径:行号` 证据；仅以用户态 shell 充当内核 monitor 视为 **未切题** 应判 `stub` 或 `not_found` 并说明理由。）

evidence.excerpt: void consoleintr(int c) { ... switch (c) { case C('P'): procdump(); break; ... default: ... cons.buf[cons.e++ % INPUT_BUF] = c; ... } }
Only Ctrl-P triggers procdump(). Other input is buffered for user-space shell (consoleread). No command parsing loop or multiple monitor commands found in kernel.

answers.stem: 是否实现 GDB stub（需数据包解析循环，如 handle_gdb_packet）？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: No source files implementing GDB packet parsing (e.g. handle_gdb_packet) found in kernel source. QEMU provides external stub.

answers.stem: 错误码/错误类型体系是什么？（errno/Result/Error enum；给类型定义与传播点证据）
answers.value: Kernel uses global 'errno' (int) defined in errno.h. lwIP subsystem uses 'err_t' (enum). Syscalls return -1 on error.

evidence.excerpt: typedef enum { ERR_OK = 0, ERR_MEM = -1, ... } err_enum_t; typedef s8_t err_t;

answers.stem: 是否存在 trace/perf/ftrace 等跟踪机制或 tracepoints？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: uint64 sys_trace(void) { int mask; if (argint(0, &mask) < 0) return -1; myproc()->tmask = mask; return 0; }
if ((p->tmask & (1 << num)) != 0) { printf("pid %d: %s -> %d\n", p->pid, sysnames[num], p->trapframe->a0); }
